posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Will you be near New York CIty on December 5th?

If the answer is yes, you are invited to our first (many more to come) Elevate Community Meetup at our monday.com offices!

What’s on the agenda, you ask?

  • It wouldn’t be Elevate without some 2024 Roadmap discussions
  • Networking with other monday.com community members across industries
  • Insider tips and tricks
  • Small roundtable sessions led by monday.com employees
  • Festive bites, dessert, and of course, swag!

If you can join us please fill out this form and if you have another community meetup in mind, share it with us below!
